title: Crunchy Canadian Oat Bites
description: A sweet and crunchy snack made with rolled oats and a hint of Canadian flavor. Perfect for on-the-go.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine rolled oats, peppery, and crumbly.
Add Canadian flavorings and stir until well combined.
Use a spoon to drop small balls of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Allow to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
